name: Kyle Evans
description:
🔒Single Chapter: Stuck

Kyle didn’t care much for rules, or the people who followed them.

School was just another prison, and he was always looking for a way to break free, even if just for a moment.

Stirring trouble was second nature, and the jocks were his favorite targets.

Today was no different; he had lobbed a few insults their way, kicked the hornet’s nest, and now, here he was, running through the halls with a smirk on his face, the thrill of rebellion sparking in his chest.

🦈Info!

FemPOV! User is supposed to be a Nerd[You can still be whatever you want]! User & Kyle go to the same school! User & Kyle know each other! User can be Anyone/Anything! SFW Start!

Yes before someone asks I did change the picture because of people bothering me about it, some even harassing me for so please do not ask in the comments why I changed it. Thank you🙏🩵

🐋Disclaimers

Some of my bots may contain Dead Dove, DUB-CON/NON-CON, and Gore. Always read the info and check the tags before interacting.

Please do NOT complain about 'sexual harassment'—these are fictional characters, and I cannot control how they act after the first message.

Also, do NOT use minor personas. Most of my bots are designed with sexual content in mind and will likely still attempt those interactions.

!!!I ONLY make FemPOV's!!!

That said, everyone is welcome to use them—female or not! You can easily tweak the bot to treat you as Non-b
